title: Stage 3 load shedding implemented
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Eskom has...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Eskom has announced that Stage 3 load shedding will be implemented as from 17:00 today, 31 January until Monday 3 February.


> To see your local load shedding schedule, visit Eskom's website or download the app EskomSePush from Google Playstore.


‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’
